Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AddOutputCaptureTarget method adds the specified output capture target to this framebuffer. This allows the results of rendering to a framebuffer to be retrieved by the application.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void AddOutputCaptureTarget(IFrameBufferOutput* captureTarget, AttachmentType type, size_t index = 0);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The output capture target to attach to this framebuffer.
The framebuffer attachment type to capture.
The attachment index within the specified attachment type.
